translation.视频按条价计费说明（Token模式）: When the console shows quota as tokens, per‑video list prices still use the same numeric scale as other fixed model prices. Internal billing converts to quota using **QuotaPerUnit** and group ratios. Match by resolution or use the single price field below.
translation.视频按条价计费说明（人民币展示）: Use the same price basis as other model prices: when the site shows quota in CNY (Operation → Quota display type = CNY), enter each completed video in CNY. Billing converts using **QuotaPerUnit** (quota per USD of list price) and the configured USD→CNY rate into internal quota, then applies group ratio and channel discount. Rows match the closest WxH from the request; you can leave the table empty and use the single price below.
translation.视频按条价计费说明（美元等）: Per completed video in USD (same unit as flat VideoPrice). Billing = price × **QuotaPerUnit** × group ratio × channel discount. **QuotaPerUnit** is the option “quota per USD of list price”. Rows match the closest resolution; you can omit the table and use the single field below.
translation.视频按条价计费说明（自定义货币）: Prices follow the custom display currency from Operation settings (symbol and rate vs USD). Internal billing converts via **QuotaPerUnit** into quota, then group ratio and discounts apply. Match by resolution or use the single field below.

translation.视频预扣逻辑说明: Malipo ya awali yanafuata **Kwa sekunde** / **Kwa klipu**: kwanza **kwa sekunde** — chukua muda wa **matokeo** kutoka ombi (metadata / seconds / duration, au chaguomsingi), **panda juu** hadi sekunde nzima, zidisha bei kwa sekunde kulingana na hali maandishi/picha/video, uwekaji wa **matokeo** na sauti, kisha badilisha kuwa nakala (QuotaPerUnit), uwiano wa kikundi na punguzo la chaneli; ikiwa hakuna sheria halali ya sekunde, tumia **kwa klipu** au bei moja bila jedwali. Njia kuu **si** “(muda wa kuingia+matokeo)×P×U×FPS÷1024”.

translation.高危状态码重试风险告知与免责声明Markdown:
### ⚠️ Uendeshaji wa hatari kubwa: Ilani ya hatari na kanusho kwa jaribio la tena 504/524
Kwa chaguo-msingi, mradi huu hujaribu tena kwa misimbo ya hali `400` (ombi baya), `504` (muda wa lango umeisha), na `524` (muda umeisha).
 Katika matukio mengi, 504 na 524 inamaanisha ombi limefikia huduma ya AI ya juu na uchakataji umeanza, lakini muunganisho ulifungwa kwa sababu ya muda mrefu wa uchakataji.

Kuwezesha uelekezi/jaribio la tena kwa misimbo hii ya muda ni **uendeshaji wa hatari kubwa**. Kabla ya kuwezesha, lazima usome na uelewe matokeo yafuatayo:

#### 1. Hatari kuu (soma kwa uangalifu)
1. 💸 Hatari ya malipo mara mbili/mengi: Watoa huduma wengi wa AI ya juu **bado wanatoa gharama** kwa maombi yaliyoanza kuchakuliwa lakini yakatishwa kwa muda wa mtandao (504/524). Ikiwa jaribio la tena linawashwa, ombi jipya la juu litatumwa, ambalo linaweza kusababisha **malipo mara mbili au mengi**.
2. ⏳ Muda wa mteja mkali: Ikiwa ombi moja tayari limeisha muda, kuongeza majaribio yanaweza kuongeza ucheleweshaji wa jumla na kusababisha tabia ya muda isiyokubalika kwa mteja wa mwisho.
3. 💥 Hatari ya foleni ya maombi na kuanguka kwa mfumo: Kulazimisha majaribio ya tena kwenye maombi yenye muda kunafanya mifuatano na miunganisho itumike kwa muda mrefu. Chini ya utendakazi wa pamoja mkubwa, hii inaweza kusababisha foleni kubwa, kukosa rasilimali, kushindwa kwa mfululizo, na kuanguka kwa huduma yako ya wakala.

#### 2. Kukiri hatari
Ukibado kuchagua kuwezesha kipengele hiki, unakiri yote yafuatayo:
